title: Infosys Recognized Among 2026 World's Most Ethical Companies by Ethisphere
detailed_summary: Infosys announced that Ethisphere recognized it as one of the 2026 World's Most Ethical Companies. The recognition was awarded for the sixth consecutive year and relates to Infosys's ethics, compliance, governance, ESG, DEI, and value-chain practices. The announcement is an award recognition and does not report financial performance, guidance, business operations, or a material corporate action.

key_facts.fact: Infosys was recognized as one of the 2026 World's Most Ethical Companies by Ethisphere.
Infosys has been recognized for the sixth consecutive year.
In 2026, 138 honorees were recognized, spanning 17 countries and 40 industries.

esg_or_csr_items.item: Infosys was recognized by Ethisphere among the 2026 World's Most Ethical Companies for its ethics, compliance, governance, ESG, DEI, and value-chain practices.

important_text_spans.text: Infosys has been recognized for the sixth consecutive year and is one of only a select group of honorees in  the  Technology  industry.
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the repeated recognition and industry context.

important_text_spans.text: In  2026,  138  honorees  were  recognized,  spanning  17  countries  and  40 industries.
important_text_spans.reason: Provides scale of the recognition program.

processing_notes: Generic Infosys company profile details and safe harbor risk language were excluded because they are boilerplate and not part of the award event.
